name: DocumentReferenceType
title: DocumentReference Type
description:
This valueset defines the code specifying the precise type of document. 
List of configured document type are accessible using valueset 'aria-documenttype'. All values can be accessed using  $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/documentreference-type&publisher=Organization-Prov-1
